basic_details.job_title: HPPSC Scientific Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Himachal Pradesh Public Service Commission (HPPSC) Scientific Officer (NDPS) Notification 2026 has been released on 10 June 2026 on the official website of HPPSC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the HPPSC Scientific Officer (NDPS) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules. Five years relaxation in upper age limit is admissible only to the Bonafide S.C. of H.P. / S.T. of H.P. / O.B.C. of H.P./W.F.F. of H.P./Persons with disabilities of Himachal Pradesh. For H.P. Govt. employees and Ex-Servicemen of H.P.; age relaxation is as per Government’s instructions issued from time to time.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Forensic Science (Chemical Sciences), Chemistry, Bio-Chemistry, Pharmacy/M.S.(Pharm.)/M. Pharm. with 3 years experience.
qualification.details: At least 2nd class M.Sc. in Forensic Science (with specialization/ dissertation work/ course work/ project work in the field of Chemical Sciences). OR At least 2nd class M.Sc. in Chemistry/ Bio-Chemistry, Pharmacy/ M.S.(Pharm.)/ M. Pharm. from a recognized University. Minimum three (03) years of post-qualification experience (acquired after obtaining the degrees mentioned above) in Research, Training and Analytical Work within any of the subjects as specified above. Any research work conducted specifically for the completion of a Ph.D. degree shall be counted towards the total required experience of three years.

selection_process: Objective type screening test & descriptive subject aptitude test Personality test.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HPPSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: HPPSC Scientific Officer (NDPS) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the HPPSC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download HPPSC Scientific Officer (NDPS) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: HPPSC Scientific Officer (NDPS) Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
HPPSC Scientific Officer (NDPS) Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: At least 2nd class M.Sc. in Forensic Science (with specialization/ dissertation work/ course work/ project work in the field of Chemical Sciences). OR At least 2nd class M.Sc. in Chemistry/ Bio-Chemistry, Pharmacy/ M.S.(Pharm.)/ M. Pharm. from a recognized University. Minimum three (03) years of post-qualification experience (acquired after obtaining the degrees mentioned above) in Research, Training and Analytical Work within any of the subjects as specified above. Any research work conducted specifically for the completion of a Ph.D. degree shall be counted towards the total required experience of three years.

content_sections.heading: HPPSC Scientific Officer (NDPS) Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
HPPSC Scientific Officer (NDPS) Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules. Five years relaxation in upper age limit is admissible only to the Bonafide S.C. of H.P. / S.T. of H.P. / O.B.C. of H.P./W.F.F. of H.P./Persons with disabilities of Himachal Pradesh. For H.P. Govt. employees and Ex-Servicemen of H.P.; age relaxation is as per Government’s instructions issued from time to time.

content_sections.heading: HPPSC Scientific Officer (NDPS) Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
HPPSC Scientific Officer (NDPS) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
HPPSC Scientific Officer (NDPS) Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Objective type screening test & descriptive subject aptitude test Personality test.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HPPSC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: HPPSC Scientific Officer (NDPS) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HPPSC Scientific Officer (NDPS) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the HPPSC Scientific Officer (NDPS) recruitment is 07 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Scientific Officer (NDPS) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Scientific Officer (NDPS) post released by HPPSC.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need an M.Sc. in Forensic Science (Chemical Sciences), Chemistry, Bio-Chemistry, Pharmacy/M.S.(Pharm.)/M. Pharm. with at least three years of post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Scientific Officer (NDPS) post?
faq.answer: The age limit is between 18 years and 45 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Scientific Officer (NDPS) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 28000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the HPPSC Scientific Officer (NDPS) recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official HPPSC website before the closing date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for the General/OBC category?
faq.answer: The application fee for the General/OBC category is Rs. 600.00.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an Objective Type Screening Test & Descriptive Subject Aptitude Test, followed by a Personality Test.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is available in the "Important Links" section of this article.
